prompt:
Fix PR #299 on branch agent/20260302-1855-70c6. Two changes needed:

1. Remove the hardware diagnostic packages (smartmontools, nvme-cli, lm_sensors, memtester) that were added to modules/common/system.nix. Only keep the MemTest86+ boot entry.

2. Guard the MemTest86+ boot entry with lib.mkIf so it doesn't break on hosts without systemd-boot (like the WSL host makers-nix). Change it to:
   boot.loader.systemd-boot.memtest86 = lib.mkIf config.boot.loader.systemd-boot.enable { enable = true; };

Make sure lib and config are available in the function parameters of system.nix. Commit and push to the existing PR branch.
